assertions.assertion: Uses AddAspNetIdentityMigration() with a connection string pointing to the existing ASP.NET Identity database
assertions.rationale: AddAspNetIdentityMigration is a Duende-specific API not in general knowledge.

assertions.assertion: States that existing password hashes are preserved (users can log in with current passwords)
assertions.rationale: The specific migration behavior is Duende implementation detail.

assertions.assertion: Mentions that migration is idempotent (subsequent runs skip already-imported users)
assertions.rationale: Idempotency of the Duende migration tool is specific product knowledge.

assertions.assertion: Mentions that after migration users can enroll in passwordless methods
assertions.rationale: The passwordless enrollment after migration is a Duende-specific workflow.
